description: Abeygoda Liyanage Podi Appuhamy Vs The Hon. Attorney General, before Hon. Amal Ranaraja, J.
parties: Abeygoda Liyanage Podi Appuhamy Vs The Hon. Attorney General,
keywords: Grave sexual abuse – Sexual harassment – Mitigating circumstances – Proportionate sentencing by considering the point of view of the public and the offender
